title: Implement meetings archive source contract with focused route/schema tests
description: Artifact: docs/implementation/meetings-archive/tasks/001-source-contract.md. Implement only the source contract step: create meetings route helpers, raw frontmatter/transcript schema modules, Astro meetings collection, and apps/www/src/data/meetings/AGENTS.md without adding fake public meeting data. Acceptance: collection only accepts YYYY-MM-DD/slug/index.md sources, date/slug mismatches fail, required text is nonblank, unsupported MVP fields are rejected, transcript schema validates speakers/segments, route helpers have path/URL/canonical and blank input tests. Verification: pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www test -- src/lib/meetings; pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www typecheck.

title: Implement meetings domain loader and public DTO with focused meetings tests
description: Artifact: docs/implementation/meetings-archive/tasks/002-domain-loader-public-dto.md. Implement only the domain loader/public DTO step: create apps/www/src/lib/meetings/types.ts, mapper.ts, load.ts, public-dto.ts and focused unit tests. Acceptance: minimal fixture maps with title/date/summary/slug; full fixture maps protocol fields, participants, documents and transcript segments; mapper rejects impossible invariants clearly; public DTO proves camelCase output and stable URLs; loader tests use fixtures, not fake public meeting files. Boundaries: do not create HTML pages, Markdown routes, JSON route, llms routes, or video embeds. Required reading/skills are in the artifact. Verification: pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www test -- src/lib/meetings; pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www typecheck.

title: Implement meeting mentions and shared registry with focused tests
description: Artifact: docs/implementation/meetings-archive/tasks/003-meeting-mentions.md. Implement only the meeting mentions slice: extend the shared mention type, add meeting mention targets and a combined site mention registry, wire meeting source refs/backlinks only as specified, and cover unknown meetings, labelled mentions, self-links, person mentions in meeting bodies, and person/meeting slug conflicts. Coordinate before touching apps/www/src/lib/meetings/load.ts if another Step 3 worker has started. Verification: pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www test -- src/lib/mentions src/lib/meetings src/lib/news src/lib/status src/lib/people; pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www typecheck.

title: Build meetings HTML index and detail pages with focused UI checks
description: Artifact: docs/implementation/meetings-archive/tasks/004-html-pages.md. Implement only the HTML pages slice: create apps/www/src/pages/meetings/index.astro and apps/www/src/pages/meetings/[date]/[slug]/index.astro, keep /meetings/ out of main navigation, hide absent optional sections, expose stable summary/protocol/recording and timecode anchors, avoid iframe embeds until task 010, and preserve mobile readability. Verification: pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www test -- src/components src/lib/meetings; pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www typecheck; use browser testing only if a dev server is already running or the user asks for one.

title: Add per-meeting Markdown companions through AST helpers
description: Artifact: docs/implementation/meetings-archive/tasks/005-markdown-companions.md. Implement only the per-meeting Markdown companion slice: create apps/www/src/lib/meetings/markdown.ts and apps/www/src/pages/meetings/[date]/[slug]/index.md.ts, generate Markdown through @shelkovo/markdown AST/app helpers, include stable metadata, links and anchors, avoid Markdown tables and whole-document lines.join assembly, and cover minimal/full meeting behavior with focused tests. Verification: pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www test -- src/lib/meetings src/pages/meetings; pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www typecheck.

title: Publish meetings JSON feed from public DTO
description: Artifact: docs/implementation/meetings-archive/tasks/006-json-feed.md. Implement only the JSON feed slice: create apps/www/src/pages/meetings/data/meetings.json.ts from loadMeetingsData() and the public DTO adapter, return pretty camelCase JSON with final newline and Content-Type application/json; charset=utf-8, omit schema/OpenAPI additions, and prove minimal/full payload behavior without leaking raw snake_case. Verification: pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www test -- src/lib/meetings src/pages/meetings; pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www typecheck.

title: Implement meetings llms surfaces with focused llms/meetings tests
description: Artifact: docs/implementation/meetings-archive/tasks/007-llms-surfaces.md. Add /meetings/llms.txt and /meetings/llms-full.txt plus root AI text references using AST-compatible llms helpers, concise public text, stable URLs, no filesystem path leaks, and verify with pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www test -- src/lib/llms src/lib/meetings plus typecheck.

title: Register meetings public surfaces and nginx expectations with focused discovery/cache tests
description: Artifact: docs/implementation/meetings-archive/tasks/008-public-surface-and-nginx.md. Register meetings public surfaces, root discovery/catalog coverage, route cache/nginx expectations for HTML/Markdown/JSON/llms routes, keep iframe CSP out of scope, no main-menu link, and verify public-surface/root-discovery/route-cache focused tests plus typecheck.

title: Wire meetings sitemap inclusion rules and no-navigation invariant with focused tests
description: Artifact: docs/implementation/meetings-archive/tasks/009-sitemap-and-navigation.md. Exclude /meetings/ from sitemap, include meeting detail pages with conservative metadata, keep Markdown/JSON/llms out of sitemap, verify main menu still omits meetings, and run focused sitemap/sitemap-data tests plus typecheck.

title: Run final meetings archive integration review
description: Artifact: docs/implementation/meetings-archive/tasks/011-final-integration-review.md. Run the final integration review only after tasks 001-009 are closed and task 010 remains intentionally blocked without a selected iframe provider. Acceptance: verify /meetings/ public contract, sitemap/navigation invariants, Markdown/JSON/llms/public-surface consistency, no arbitrary iframe rendering, no fake public meeting content, docs statuses and task completion notes. Required verification from artifact: pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www typecheck; pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www test; pnpm build; git status; git diff; git log --oneline -10.
